team.team_lead_fullstack: You - Next.js, Neon Postgres, Vercel integration, deployment pipeline
team.frontend_lead: Sagar - Next.js UI, agent detail, dashboard, submit form
team.backend_deployment: Krishna - FastAPI deploy service, Vercel API, agent packaging
team.backend_metrics: Jeet - Health checks, trust scoring, analytics, cron jobs

system_architect.note: May add as template if time permits

security_auditor.note: May add as template if time permits

architecture.deployment: User's own Vercel account via @vercel/client or REST API
architecture.trust_scoring: Editorial badges Days 1-7, algorithmic scores Day 8+

tasks.name: Initialize Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Install and configure shadcn/ui + Tailwind
Set up Neon Postgres on Vercel Marketplace
Configure SQLAlchemy + Alembic (or Drizzle), run initial migrations
Create models: User, Agent, Deployment, UsageMetric
CRITICAL: Vercel cross-account deploy PoC — clone sample agent, deploy to test account, capture URL
If PoC fails: implement fallback GitHub 'Deploy to Vercel' template button
Next.js route structure: /, /agents/[slug], /submit, /dashboard, /api/*
Auth flow: User Vercel OAuth/token storage (encrypted)
Add .env + .gitignore for all credentials
Submit form UI: GitHub URL, name, description, category, env vars, demo config
Backend: GET /agents, GET /agents/{slug}, POST /agents/deploy endpoints
GitHub repo cloning and validation
Agent structure validation (main.py, requirements.txt, .env.example)
Package agent as Vercel-deployable project (vercel.json, Fluid Compute config)
Vercel project creation via API (user's token)
Env var management — set user's .env as encrypted Vercel env vars
Trigger Vercel deploy, wait for completion, capture URL
Run demo test on deployed agent, validate /api/demo returns result
Register agent in marketplace DB with deployment metadata
Build 4 seed templates: API Builder, Live Debugger, Code Reviewer, Data Analyst
Deploy seed templates to marketplace
Home page: hero, search, agent card grid, category filters
Agent detail page: hero, live demo panel, capabilities, deploy CTA
Live demo panel: input editor, run button, result display, error handling
Loading/empty/error states for all pages
Dashboard: user's deployed agents with status badges
Agent card component: name, description, badge, deploy count, Deploy button
Responsive design: mobile, tablet, desktop layouts
Activity feed component (recent deployments, new agents)
Editorial badges: Staff Pick, First Edition, Verified
Health check service: GET /api/health on all deployed agents
Vercel Cron job: health check every 6 hours
Trust score computation service (Day 8+ when data exists)
Usage metrics API: collect API calls, response times, error rates
Per-agent analytics page with charts
Deployment history with success/failure tracking
Agent reviews and ratings system
Leaderboard: trending, top rated, most deployed
Fork and customize: clone agent, modify, redeploy
Agent template library page
E2E tests: browse → try demo → submit → deploy flow
Security audit: token encryption, input validation, rate limiting
Performance: Lighthouse audit, image optimization, code splitting
Demo recording fallback
README, deploy guide, agent spec documentation
Public launch — shareable URL, social distribution

demo_flow: Try live demo on agent detail page
Submit your own agent from GitHub repo
See it listed on marketplace with demo working

functional: Marketplace displays agents with rich detail (live demo, metrics, badge)
Agent submission: GitHub repo → deployed Vercel URL in <2 minutes
Live demo panel works on agent detail page
Dashboard shows user's deployed agents with status
Trust signals visible (editorial badges → algorithm scores by Day 8)
infrastructure: Vercel cross-account deploy PoC working (or fallback: GitHub template)
launch: At least 4 seed agents deployed and visible
Full user flow: browse → try demo → submit agent → deploy
Shareable URL for public launch by Day 5

risks.risk: Vercel cross-account deploy is complex or flaky
risks.mitigation: Day 1 PoC. Fallback: GitHub 'Deploy to Vercel' template button

risks.risk: No demand for the marketplace concept
risks.mitigation: Ship shareable URL by Day 5, measure real engagement before Days 9-10 build-out

risks.risk: Community features (Days 9-10) not worth the time
risks.mitigation: Cut if core flow is not solid. Reviews, leaderboard, fork are nice-to-have.
